full_description:
I want to launch a mobile-only puzzle game that focuses on word-based challenges. The core loop should revolve around progressive word puzzles—think daily quizzes, timed anagrams, and streak bonuses—that keep players returning and, most importantly, spending.

My main objective is clear: build a fun experience that can scale revenue quickly. Please architect ad placement (interstitials, rewarded video) and in-app purchases such as hint packs and premium puzzle bundles. Smooth onboarding, social sharing, and leaderboard functionality will help boost retention and organic growth, so weave those in from the start.

I will supply theme ideas and a rough list of puzzle categories; you’ll handle game design documents, art direction guidance, coding, and store-ready builds for both iOS and Android. Use whichever engine you’re fastest with—Unity or Godot works fine—as long as it supports easy content updates and analytics integration.

Deliverables 
• Full source code with clear commenting 
• Playable builds (Android APK + iOS TestFlight) 
• Integrated monetisation (ads + IAP) hooked to Firebase or a comparable analytics suite 
• Basic store assets: icons, screenshots, short trailer 
• Post-launch support window for minor fixes and first content update

Acceptance criteria 
• First 50 levels fully playable, no critical bugs 
• Session length averaging 3+ minutes in closed beta 
• Successful purchase flow and ad display in sandbox mode 
• All text strings externalised for quick localisation

If this aligns with your skill set, I’m ready to move quickly—let’s make a word puzzle hit that earns real revenue.

The core purpose is clear: take real-time data—whether it’s an API feed, IoT input, or manual entry—run it through a simple model, and return an instant income estimate that updates as the numbers change.

full_description:
I run a YouTube commentary channel and I'm looking for a skilled video editor to edit long-form "video essay" style content — think dark, cinematic, fast-retention storytelling (similar to channels like "Moon").

You'll receive a finished script and a voiceover. Your job is to turn it into a gripping, retention-optimized video.

- Edit 10–15 minute videos from my voiceover + script
- Source and sync relevant B-roll, clips, and images to the narration
- Add clean text/kinetic typography pop-ups for emphasis

- Color grade footage for a consistent dark/moody/teal look

- Full script
- Professional voiceover (audio file)
- Style references and any specific clips I want included

- You've edited commentary, video essays, or documentary-style YouTube content before
- You understand YouTube retention and pacing (not just technical editing)
- You can find good B-roll/footage yourself
- You're reliable with deadlines and communication

full_description:
I am relocating to Portugal and need a bilingual professional who can handle three concrete tasks for me, in this order of urgency: 

1. Secure a legally compliant long-term rental contract in my name. The property can be anywhere in mainland Portugal as long as it is accepted by SEF/Immigration for residency purposes. I will supply my preferred budget and basic housing criteria once we start; you will source options, negotiate with the landlord or agent, and forward the draft lease for my signature. A signed, utility-ready contract is the first deliverable. 

2. Manage the entire NIF (Número de Identificação Fiscal) application. That means arranging a fiscal representative if required, completing every form on Portal das Finanças, booking any in-person slots, paying the applicable fees, and sending me the official NIF certificate once issued. I would like this wrapped up immediately after the rental contract is secured so the address matches. 

3. Obtain the declaração (proof of accommodation) issued by the local Junta de Freguesia or relevant authority. I only need the final stamped document; all form filling, submission, and follow-up with the office will be on your side. 

Deliverables (in PDF scan plus original where possible): 
• Signed rental contract 
• Official NIF certificate 
• Stamped declaração 

Acceptance criteria: each document must carry the exact personal details I provide and be verifiable through the issuing authority. • Develop all agreed features with clean, well-documented code and integrate any required third-party APIs or Firebase services. 
• Implement unit tests and run lint checks to ensure stability on Android 8.0 (Oreo) and above. 
• Package the signed APK/AAB, prepare store assets, and guide the submission through Google Play review. 

Deliverables 
- Source code in a Git repository 
- Signed APK/AAB ready for production 
- Build & environment documentation 
- Play Store graphics, screenshots, and copy 

Acceptance criteria 
1. App installs and runs without crashes on Android 8.0+. 
2. All promised features function as specified. 
3. UI meets accessibility standards and passes automated tests. 
4. Codebase is lint-clean and covered by the provided unit tests. 

Include in your proposal a brief development roadmap, major milestones, and any prior Android projects that highlight your expertise. Flexibility to explore an iOS version later is welcome but not required at this stage.

full_description:
I have designed a worksheet in Google Sheets that doubles as a pre-formatted form. My data-entry team must be able to type a new record’s demographic fields into a quick, user-friendly interface and, at the press of a button, have three things happen: 

1. The data is appended to a master log sheet in the same file (one row per submission, no risk of overwriting). 
2. The visual form sheet refreshes with the freshly entered values. 
3. That completed form is instantly saved as a properly named PDF (same layout as the sheet) in a Drive folder and optionally opened for printing.

Everything has to run end-to-end in Google Apps Script, preferably exposed through a custom menu or sidebar so my team never sees the script itself. The script must work for any future rows we add and keep file names unique—date-time stamp plus one key field is fine.

Deliverables 
• Clean, commented .gs file(s) ready to paste into the Script Editor 
• Brief “How to install & use” doc (one page is enough) 
• One short Loom or GIF demo showing the workflow from entry to PDF

Acceptance criteria 
• No manual copying or formatting required once the user hits “Submit/Print” 
• PDF output matches the current sheet’s print view exactly 
• New submissions never overwrite existing rows 
• Runs under the standard account permissions (no Admin console changes)

I will share a view-only link to the sheet layout once we agree to proceed.

full_description:
I’m preparing to open a third pizza location here in Calgary, and the bank has asked for a complete expansion plan supported by solid financial projections. I already operate two profitable stores and can supply detailed historical sales, cost, and margin data from both sites.

Here’s what I need from you: 

• A polished, lender-ready business plan that clearly presents an Executive Summary, a data-driven Market Analysis focused on Calgary and surrounding suburbs, and a practical Marketing Strategy outlining launch-through-year-one tactics (digital, local partnerships, promos, etc.). 
• Five-year financial projections—income statement, cash-flow forecast, and balance sheet—built in Excel (or Google Sheets) and linked so assumptions can be tweaked easily. 
• Loan-specific ratios and break-even analysis to satisfy the bank’s credit team. 
• A concise appendix showing the historical performance of my existing two stores so the growth narrative is obvious. 

I’ll provide raw POS exports, labor and food-cost reports, lease terms for the new site, and vendor pricing. Your job is to turn that data into a clear story that demonstrates viability and repayment capacity.

If you’ve created Canadian small-business expansion plans before—especially for QSR or franchise concepts—let me know. Familiarity with Canadian taxation, wage rules, and Calgary demographic data would be a plus. 

Deliver the draft within 10 days; I’ll review, comment once, and we’ll finalize a bank-ready PDF plus the editable spreadsheets.

Virtual Assistant for Lead Generation & Vendor Recruitment

Project Overview

I am launching a marketplace that connects Airbnb and vacation rental hosts with trusted service providers and vendors that sell goods and services that are commonly purchased for rental properties.

I am looking for a highly motivated Virtual Assistant who can research businesses, contact them, and help onboard them onto the platform.

This is not just data entry. I need someone who can help grow the marketplace.

Research

* Find service providers across the United States
* Build and maintain a vendor database
* Verify contact information

Outreach

* Cold email businesses
* Cold call businesses

* Follow up with interested vendors

Vendor Recruitment

* Explain the benefits of joining 
* Invite vendors to become Founding Vendors for free for limited time

* Track outreach and responses

* House Cleaning

* Lawn Care

Requirements

* Strong English communication skills
* Experience with lead generation
* Experience with cold outreach
* Comfortable making phone calls
* Organized and detail oriented

Bonus Skills

* Airbnb or vacation rental experience

Compensation

* Hourly

* Performance Bonuses

Bonus compensation available for every vendor successfully onboarded.

When Applying

* Examples of lead generation projects

Revamp Flutter App & Database
I have an existing Flutter application that has fallen behind on both its tech stack and visual style. Your job is to bring it back up to speed.
First, the app must stop pointing to its legacy back-end and establish a fresh connection to a new SQL-based database. Any data models and queries in the current Dart code will need to be refactored so they work cleanly with the new schema while keeping performance tight.
While that back-end work is happening, I also want the Ul modernised.
This is not a full artistic re-imagination but rather a facelift that applies current design patterns-think updated typography, spacing, and material components that match the latest Flutter guidelines. The navigation flow stays the same; the look and feel move forward.
Finally, several ageing features must be brought up to date:
• Push notifications: migrate to the latest Firebase Messaging APls and verify they deliver reliably on both iOS and Android.
• User authentication: update the sign-in flow, refresh token handling, and any social login packages so they comply with current SK versions.
• Payment gateway: replace deprecated payment plugins with their maintained equivalents, ensure secure checkout, and run test transactions to confirm everything works end-to-end.
Acceptance will be based on:
1. A Git repository showing clean commits for database refactor, Ul refresh, and each feature update.
2. Successful build and run on both iOS and Android emulators/devices without deprecation warnings.
3. Demonstrable connection to the new SQL database with CRUD
operations working.
4. Verified push notifications, sign-in/sign-up, and payment flow in staging.
